title: How do I access your oral history collections? - AskUs
text:
[](https://www.thehenryford.org/collections-and-research/)

## How do I access your oral history collections?

## Answer

We have a range of oral histories relating to automotive design, Ford Motor Company, and innovation:

* [Automotive Design Oral Histories at U of M Dearborn](http://www.autolife.umd.umich.edu/Oral_histories.htm)
* [Automotive Design Oral Histories (THF webpage)](http://www.dalnetarchive.org/handle/11061/6226)
  
    + Transcripts of interviews with automotive designers conducted in the late 1980s.
* [Ford Reminiscences](http://cdm15889.contentdm.oclc.org/)
  
    + Transcripts of over 200 interviews with Ford Motor Company employees and others associated with the company, conducted during 1951-1956.
* [OnInnovation](http://oninnovation.com/)
  
    + Watch videos of interviews with innovators such as Bill Gates, Martha Stewart, Steve Wozniak, and Pierre Omidyar.

### Topics

* Ford Motor Company
* Automobiles
* Design
* Automotive
